rationale: The only direct evidence is a DOI-level match (10.1509/jmr.15.0398) with no in-text citation context, so the citation’s function in the 2021 minimum-wage paper is unclear. While the papers overlap broadly on grocery/nutrition demand (both use purchase data), their focal questions differ (minimum wage effects vs. FTC false-claim enforcement), so this is not safe to drop but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
